mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activitymember (activityID, memberID, role, confirmAttendStatus, confirmTime) VALUES (#{activityID}, #{memberID}, #{role}, #{confirmAttendStatus}, #{confirmTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM activitymember WHERE activityID = #{activityID} AND memberID = #{memberID}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activitymember WHERE activityID = #{activityID} AND memberID = #{memberID}
SELECT * FROM activitymember WHERE activityID = #{activityID} ORDER BY role DESC, memberID
